name: Onboarding WF4B — Audit Call Processing (Form → AI → Update GitHub + Notion)

parameters.formDescription: Paste the BlueDot transcript after an audit call. Claude will refine the proposal and implementation guide, update the existing GitHub repo, and log the audit in Notion.

values.placeholder: Paste the full BlueDot transcript here...
Optional: Paste BlueDot's own summary if available

nodes.name: Audit Call Transcript Form
nodes.notes: Localhost form trigger for audit call transcripts. For production: replace with n8n Webhook node for BlueDot Svix webhooks.

nodes.name: Upload Transcript to Drive
nodes.notes: Uploads the audit call transcript to the client's existing Google Drive folder (created during STEP4 discovery call).

nodes.name: GitHub: Upload Audit Transcript
nodes.notes: Uploads the audit call transcript as a new file in the client's existing GitHub repo.

values.content:
=You are a business consultant for Veteran Vectors, an automation consulting firm that helps small businesses (2-20 employees) automate their operations using n8n, Notion, and AI tools.

This is an AUDIT CALL — a follow-up to a previous discovery call. The client has already seen an initial proposal and is now doing a deeper dive into their systems and requirements. Your job is to REFINE and IMPROVE the existing proposal and implementation guide based on the new information.

Produce FOUR clearly separated sections using the exact markers below.

===MEETING_NOTES===
1. AUDIT CALL SUMMARY (2-3 paragraphs covering what was audited, key findings, and assessment)
2. SYSTEMS AUDITED (bulleted list of specific systems, processes, or workflows reviewed)
3. NEW REQUIREMENTS or CHANGES (anything that differs from the original discovery call)
4. TECHNICAL FINDINGS (specific pain points, bottlenecks, integration challenges discovered)
5. NEXT STEPS (what was agreed upon)

===PROPOSAL===
Write a REFINED proposal that incorporates audit findings:
- Executive Summary (updated with audit insights)
- Refined Automations/Solutions (updated based on what was actually seen in the audit)
- Updated ROI & Hours Saved (more accurate estimates based on audit data)
- Revised Timeline (adjusted based on complexity discovered in audit)
- Final Investment/Pricing (refined pricing based on actual scope)
- Implementation Priority Order (which automations to build first based on impact)

===IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE===
Write a REFINED step-by-step implementation guide:
- Phase 1: Foundation (data model, core integrations based on audit findings)
- Phase 2: High-Impact Automations (build highest-ROI automations first)
- Phase 3: Secondary Automations (remaining automations)
- Phase 4: Testing, Training & Handoff
- Technical Requirements (specific tools, APIs, credentials needed)
- Risk Mitigation (potential issues identified during audit and how to address them)

===ACTION_ITEMS===
Return a JSON array of action items. Each item must have exactly these fields:
[{"task": "description", "owner": "Anthony" or "Client", "priority": "high" or "medium" or "low"}]
Include 5-10 action items. Focus on what's needed to move from proposal to Statement of Work.

AUDIT CALL TRANSCRIPT:
{{ $('Extract Form Data').item.json.transcript.substring(0, 12000) }}

parameters.commitMessage: Refine proposal based on audit call findings

nodes.name: GitHub: Update Proposal
nodes.notes: Overwrites the existing proposal-draft.md with the refined version from the audit call. Uses GitHub File > Edit operation.

parameters.commitMessage: Refine implementation guide based on audit call findings

nodes.name: GitHub: Update Implementation Guide
nodes.notes: Overwrites the existing implementation-guide.md with the refined version from the audit call. Uses GitHub File > Edit operation.
